dashboard.title: Market Sentiment Overview
dashboard.subtitle: Full-content sentiment analysis powered by Claude Haiku 4.5 (anti-clickbait)

stats.title: Sentiment Stats
stats.hint: Daily sentiment distribution — green=positive, gray=neutral, red=negative

news_list.title: News
news_list.subtitle: Full-content sentiment analysis via Claude Haiku 4.5
news_list.no_stock_prompt: Stock "{{symbol}}" isn't on the watchlist — add it and start analyzing?
news_list.no_stock_hint: Adding pulls related news from multiple sources and runs Claude sentiment analysis (~1-2 min).

news_detail.clickbait_desc: Headline sentiment doesn't match body; scoring is based on the body.
news_detail.snippet_warning: Only the API snippet is available (Jina/trafilatura both failed — likely paywalled).
news_detail.translating_long: Translating from {{lang}} to English — may take 30-60 seconds, please wait…

stock_detail.no_data: No sentiment data in this range
stock_detail.waiting_first_data: Processing — data will appear when ready…

refresh.background_hint: Safe to close this tab — progress will resume when you return (job #{{id}})

settings.title: API Keys
settings.subtitle: Values are written to the DB immediately; backend picks them up live, scheduler container within the next tick (≤ 10 min).
settings.clear_db_title: Remove this key from your account
settings.saved_hint: Saved. Used the next time you refresh a stock.
settings.autosave_hint: Paste a key and it's saved automatically — no button needed.
settings.security_body: These API keys belong to your account only — they're encrypted at rest and never shared with other users. Each refresh you run spends your own keys' quota.

anthropic.label: Anthropic API Key
anthropic.help: Powers Claude Haiku 4.5 sentiment analysis; required.

alpha_vantage.label: Alpha Vantage Key
alpha_vantage.help: Includes built-in sentiment scores for baseline (25 req/day).

jina.label: Jina Reader Key (optional)
jina.help: Raises Jina Reader rate limit to 500/min; without it, 20/min anonymous.

stock_mgmt.title: Stock Management
stock_mgmt.subtitle: Deleting a stock also removes all related news / comments / sentiment / market_summary (unrecoverable).

stock_form.auto_fill_hint: Submitting looks up name / exchange / sector via Finnhub. Falls back to symbol-as-name if not found.

login.title: Sign in to FinSentiment AI
login.subtitle: Use your Google account to sign in or sign up — each user gets their own watchlist and API keys.
login.err_google: Google sign-in failed, please try again
login.err_unconfigured: Google Client ID is not configured (VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID)
